title: Web Application Session Hijacking Indicators
description: Detects indicators of session hijacking or session fixation attacks where an attacker steals or manipulates session tokens. OWASP A07:2021 Identification and Authentication Failures.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Web Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs') and ((('Attack Type' = 'session_hijacking' or 'Attack Type' = 'session_fixation' or 'Attack Type' = 'cookie_theft' or 'Attack Type' = 'token_theft')) or ('OWASP Category' like '*Authentication*'))
falsepositives: Session migration during load balancer failover
